error.signature: Widget rebuild issue: duplicate GlobalKey detected in widget tree
error.regex: (Duplicate GlobalKey|Multiple widgets used the same GlobalKey|GlobalKey.*reparented|Keys must be unique|widget.*rebuild.*key)

verdict.summary: Widget keys not used or used incorrectly causing rebuild problems, lost state, or duplicate GlobalKey errors in lists and animated widgets.

dead_ends.action: Use UniqueKey() on every widget to force rebuilds
dead_ends.why_fails: UniqueKey creates a new key every build, destroying and recreating the widget each time. Defeats the purpose of keys.

dead_ends.action: Use index as key in a list (Key(index.toString()))
dead_ends.why_fails: Index-based keys break when items are reordered, inserted, or deleted — state attaches to wrong items

workarounds.action: Use ValueKey with a stable unique identifier from the data
Use ObjectKey when items lack a unique ID
workarounds.how: ObjectKey(item)  // uses object identity; works when same object reference is reused

workarounds.action: Use GlobalKey only when you need to access widget state across the tree
workarounds.how: final _formKey = GlobalKey<FormState>();  // one GlobalKey per widget instance, never reuse
